title: Predicted false PASS: 'resolved' matches inside 'unresolved'
predicted_basis: _classify_text PASS branch matches 'resolved' inside 'unresolved' (spec FR-004 predicted trap family)

rationale: An explicitly unresolved issue with a direct investigation assignment must be SPEAK. A shallow keyword/substring classifier baits on 'resolved' inside 'unresolved' and hard-stops with PASS, silencing the assignee.
